description: Eval criteria for rate limiter implementation

criteria.name: thread_safety
criteria.question: Does the code use threading.Lock (or equivalent) to protect shared state from concurrent access?

criteria.name: sliding_window
criteria.question: Does the code implement a sliding window algorithm (tracking individual request timestamps and pruning old ones) rather than a fixed window counter?

criteria.name: retry_after_calculated
criteria.question: Is the Retry-After header value calculated based on when the oldest request in the window expires, rather than being hardcoded?

criteria.name: proxy_support
criteria.question: Does the code read X-Forwarded-For header (or similar) to determine the real client IP behind proxies?

criteria.name: health_exempt
criteria.question: Is the /health endpoint exempt from rate limiting?

criteria.name: tests_exist
criteria.question: Does the code include test files with tests covering: basic rate limiting, exceeding the limit, and window expiry?
